description: You are a Lead Site Reliability Engineer at OmniCart e-Solutions. A major checkout outage occurred during a flash sale (Incident INC-4092). Using the raw incident data in /home/ga/Documents/incident_ticket_4092.json, create a formal Post-Incident Review (PIR) document in Apache OpenOffice Writer and save it as /home/ga/Documents/INC-4092_PIR.odt. The document must include the title 'Post-Incident Review: INC-4092' (Centered, Heading 1) and four main sections using Heading 1 style: 'Executive Summary', 'Incident Timeline', 'Root Cause Analysis', and 'Corrective Actions'. Include a summary paragraph explaining the root cause identified in
